title: Intensely Nutty Egyptian Milk Pudding
description: A comforting Egyptian dish featuring condensed milk and a nutty flavor, perfect for a cold evening.
instructions: In a hot pot vessel, melt the butter over medium heat.
Add the chopped pistachios and sliced almonds and cook, stirring frequently, until they are lightly toasted.
Deglaze the vessel with a little water, scraping up any browned bits from the bottom.
Add the condensed milk, rose water, vanilla extract, and salt to the vessel.
Stir constantly over medium heat until the mixture comes to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, stirring occasionally, until the pudding has thickened.
Remove the vessel from the heat and let it cool slightly.
Serve the pudding warm, garnished with additional chopped nuts if desired.
